title: DoorDash Introduces Express Grocery Delivery Service with Albertsons Companies
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  DoorDash (NYSE: DASH), the leading on-demand delivery platform, today introduced express grocery delivery, a new service that offers consumers faster and more convenient delivery of fresh groceries in under 30 minutes*, in partnership with Albertsons Companies (NYSE: ACI), one of the nation's leading food and drug retailers. As part of this launch, consumers in more than 20 major cities across the U.S., including Los Angeles, Denver, Seattle and more, will now be able to access express grocery delivery from their local Albertsons Cos.

title: DoorDash Reportedly Puts Pressure on McDonald's With Slowness Fee
text: In the ongoing power struggle between restaurant aggregators and the merchants on their platforms, DoorDash has found a new way to get the results it wants out of its restaurants. The aggregator will begin to impose higher fees on McDonald's restaurants that prepare orders more slowly, The Wall Street Journal (WSJ) reported Monday (Feb. 14).

title: DoorDash to bump up its fees on slow McDonald's restaurants
text: The delivery service, which earns money by charging restaurants a commission on every order and separately charging consumers a service fee, agreed to lower its base commission rate for McDonald's U.S. restaurants.

title: DoorDash Starts Financing Arm to Offer Restaurants Cash Advances
text: Food delivery service DoorDash Inc. will offer financing on its app to restaurants that need business loans through the new DoorDash Capital program, according to a Bloomberg report Wednesday (Feb. 9). title: Shake Shack and DoorDash launch a limited-time dating site
text: Shake Shack Inc. SHAK, -2.25% and DoorDash Inc. DASH, -3.62% have launched a limited-time dating site, Eat Cute, that aims to bring together fans of the burger chain's Buffalo Chicken Sandwich. title: DoorDash couriers struggle to secure COVID sick pay, get back to work during Omicron surge
